'''Savrant''' was the outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Bacrana system/Legends|Bacrana system]], and the smallest of the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]]. The green-yellow planet had six [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. All six were strip-[[Mining/Legends|mined]] by [[Lant Mining Corporation]] and subsequently abandoned. [[Calito]], the planet's third moon, was taken over by the [[Bacrana System Defense Force]] and converted into a surveillance post which serves to monitor the outermost regions of the system.<ref name="FBS" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-04-XX -->''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''
